title: ACED OS Flag
description: The atomic signal primitive of ACED OS. v0.2 reconciles the domain enum to the canonical EIGHT-app suite defined in ACED Lifestyle (mind, gravitic, scholar, cluster, quantum, matrix, prism, enchanted) plus two cross-cutting values (governance, system). This supersedes the v0.1 thirteen-domain list, which over-fragmented relative to the running architecture. Producers emit Flags; ACE Scholar ingests and routes; THEON stamps governance; ACED Lifestyle consumes admitted Flags, ranks them, and computes per-app attention. Single source of truth. No improvised fields.

schema_version.description: Hard-coded. Unrecognized version must be rejected, not guessed.

source.description: Producing instance: grok.tech_scout, ace_mind, ace_scholar, ace_wisdom, ace_cluster, theon_analyst, aced_lifestyle, manuel. ace_wisdom emits with domain 'scholar' since Wisdom sits beneath Scholar.

source_type.description: agent=LLM scout/synth. app=ACE organ PWA. system=OS infra (Scholar intake, THEON, Lifestyle). manual=Manuel.

domain.description: Governing organ (one of 8 apps) OR cross-cutting concern. mind=daily guidance/body/day-state/nervous-system/THEON-action (Solar). gravitic=practice/grounding/breathwork/movement (Root). scholar=learning/study/research/teaching; ABSORBS wisdom (Throat). cluster=markets/savings/crypto AND orchestration/agents/council/suite-command (Crown). quantum=probability/signal-fields/timelines/decision-uncertainty (Third Eye). matrix=cross-app relational web, life-domain coherence (Heart). prism=creative synthesis/images/plans (Sacral). enchanted=mythic atmosphere/ritual/wonder (Aura). governance=THEON admissibility, cross-cutting. system=OS-internal meta (build/admin/security). The domain lights up that app's attention pill in Lifestyle; governance routes to the THEON gate; system is OS-internal.

headline.description: One sentence. What Manuel sees if it surfaces. Stands alone without detail.

detail.description: Optional longer body, one paragraph max.

payload.description: Optional domain-specific structured data; validated by the consuming organ. e.g. cluster {entry,stop,tp1}; mind {nervous_system:0.8,sleep:0.4}.

epistemic_status.description: THEON-owned. Producers leave 'unclassified'. The junk-drawer guard.

admissibility.description: THEON verdict. pending=held in REVIEW, not shown. admitted=may enter queue. downgraded=admitted, rank halved. rejected=never shown. Gate between Scholar and Lifestyle.

falsifier.description: What observable would disprove this. Expected for trend/speculation/candidate_doctrine.

veto.description: Body-veto doctrine. True surfaces above all scored flags unconditionally. Only domains mind/gravitic/system may set true. mind+gravitic=body veto; system=security hard-stop. Replaces v0.1 body/security pair.

requires_decision.description: True routes to DECISIONS lane; in Lifestyle maps to an add_approval op. Producers suggest; Lifestyle confirms.

route_to.description: Lifestyle-owned. Organ or product that should handle this flag.

rank_score.description: Lifestyle-computed. Null until ranked. Producers must not set.

action.description: Single next action, one sentence. Null if informational.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601. When the flag goes stale and auto-archives. No flag is immortal.

outcome.description: What happened after action/decision. Feeds the War College.

parent_flag_id.description: Parent flag id if derived. Enables lineage.

tags.description: Free-form labels; not ranked. Project-type values that are NOT organs (build, admin) live here with domain 'system'.

governance_notes.description: THEON-owned. Brief reason for the admissibility verdict.

then.description: Doctrine enforcement: veto=true only if domain is mind, gravitic, or system. mind/gravitic=body veto; system=security hard-stop. Any other vetoing flag is invalid and rejected at intake.
